title: Ingersoll Rand Schedules Second-Quarter 2022 Earnings Release and Conference Call
text: DAVIDSON, N.C.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ingersoll Rand Inc. (NYSE: IR), a global provider of mission-critical flow creation and industrial solutions, will issue its second-quarter 2022 earnings release after the market closes on Wednesday, August 3, 2022. Ingersoll Rand will also host a live earnings conference call to discuss the second-quarter results on Thursday, August 4, 2022 at 8 a.m. (Eastern Time). To participate in the call, please dial 1-888-999-6177, domestically, or +1-848-280-6520, intern
